name: shared-learning emission carries a hashed identifier rather than a plaintext user identifier
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/community/shared-learning/emit.sh" --opt-in --user alice@example.com --dry-run 2>out.txt && ! grep -q 'alice@example.com' out.txt && grep -qE 'hashed_id=[a-f0-9]{8,}' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
